title: Feature Request: Option for Always On GPS After Roboot

messages.author: TF-Mambo
messages.text: Hello folks, I have a couple companion nodes that I want to have always on GPS instead of having to turn it on manually. I have looked at source to build my own FW but cannot find the location to turn this on.
messages.content_html: Hello folks, I have a couple companion nodes that I want to have always on GPS instead of having to turn it on manually. I have looked at source to build my own FW but cannot find the location to turn this on.
